zh.Tacolneston, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可塔可爾尼斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Uvedale II於1270年出生在英國素瑞迪千時，他的父親Hugh De Uvedale II60歲，母親Lady. Mary campania De evedale55歲。他和Isabel d' Etton至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1321年3月7日享年51歲。

zh-hans.Tacolneston, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可塔可爾尼斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Uvedale II于1270年出生在英国素瑞迪千时，他的父亲Hugh De Uvedale II60岁，母亲Lady. Mary campania De evedale55岁。他和Isabel d' Etton至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1321年3月7日享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Uvedale II was born in 1270, in Titsey, Surrey, England, his father, Hugh De Uvedale II, was 60 and his mother, Lady. Mary campania De evedale, was 55. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Isabel d' Etton. He died on 7 March 1321, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Uvedale II est né en 1270, à Titsey, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Hugh De Uvedale II, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady. Mary campania De evedale, avait 55 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel d' Etton. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1321, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Uvedale II 1270 in Titsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh De Uvedale II 60 und seine Mutter Lady. Mary campania De evedale 55. Er hatte mit Isabel d' Etton mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. März 1321 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Uvedale II è nato il nel 1270 nel Titsey, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Hugh De Uvedale II, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Lady. Mary campania De evedale, aveva 55 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Isabel d' Etton. Morì il 7 marzo 1321, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Tacolneston, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクタコルネストン
ja.Titsey, Surrey, England: イギリスイギリススリーティトセイ
ja.lifeSummary: John De Uvedale IIが1270年にイギリススリーティトセイで生まれた時，父Hugh De Uvedale IIは60歳，母Lady. Mary campania De evedaleは55歳であった。彼はIsabel d' Ettonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1321年3月7日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Uvedale II(이)가 1270년 영국 수리 티츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh De Uvedale II(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady. Mary campania De evedale(은)는 55세였다. 그는 Isabel d' Etton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1321년 3월 7일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Titsey, Surrey, England: Titsey, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Uvedale II nasceu em 1270, em Titsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh De Uvedale II, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady. Mary campania De evedale, tinha 55 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Isabel d' Etton. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1321, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Uvedale II родился в 1270 г. в местности тици, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh De Uvedale II было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady. Mary campania De evedale, 55. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Isabel d' Etton. Он умер 7 марта 1321 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Uvedale II nació en 1270, en Titsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh De Uvedale II, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lady. Mary campania De evedale, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Isabel d' Etton. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1321, a la edad de 51 años.
